name: Sixth Wave Innovations Inc.
description: Sixth Wave Innovations Inc. is a nanotechnology company specializing in the extraction and detection of target substances at the molecular level. The company utilizes its patented Molecularly Imprinted Polymers (MIPs) technology to develop highly selective and efficient solutions for various industries. Their primary commercial products include IXOS®, a line of extraction polymers for the gold mining industry, and Affinity™, a system designed for the purification of cannabinoids. By replacing traditional, time-consuming processes with scalable nanotechnology, Sixth Wave aims to deliver improved yields, enhanced cost-efficiency, and reduced environmental impact across its diverse applications.
